{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Gendo bird-man
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Gendo bird-man]] is a creature that can be summoned from [[Avernus]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c12">''City of Light'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
